descriptionInUI: Experimental MOOSE MANTIS IADS engine (alternative to Skynet). Only takes effect when the campaign's IADS engine is set to MANTIS; otherwise it is inert and Skynet runs instead. Provides SAM/EWR networking, emissions control, engagement tuning, EWR shoot-and-scoot, and comms/power/command-center degradation (advanced IADS). Needs an in-game pass before it becomes the default.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Emissions control (SAM radars stay dark until a target is in range)
SAM engagement range (% of max interceptor range)
Max simultaneously-active short-range SAMs per threat
Max simultaneously-active medium-range SAMs per threat
Max simultaneously-active long-range SAMs per threat
Max simultaneously-active point-defense SAMs per threat
EWR shoot-and-scoot: periodically relocate mobile EWRs
Advanced C2: degrade SAMs when their comms/power/command centers die
On comms loss, take the SAM fully dark (off) instead of autonomous
Generate debug information for RED IADS
Generate debug information for BLUE IADS
